productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Black Heels
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. The silk straps make this sandal a perfect buy. Heel: 3" Upper Silk straps across the forefoot, along the midfoot and at the backfoot Strap elasticated at the backfoot to offer a customised Fit Synthetic leather footbed with a patch Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
